es.name: Circuito RL
es.description: Calcula la constante de tiempo de un circuito RL.
es.seo_description: Calcula la constante de tiempo de un circuito RL. Calculadora gratuita, precisa e instantánea. Con conversion de unidades integrada.
es.example_label: Calculate the time constant and final current for an RL circuit with L=0.5 H and R=25 Ω.
es.result_context: The time constant {tau} s determines how fast current reaches final value {current_final} A.
es.formula_display: Ïâ€ž = L ÷ R,  I_final = V ÷ R (assuming V = 10V)
steps: Inductance L = 0.5 H, Resistance R = 25 Ω
mistakes: Confusing RL with RC time constant formula
Not understanding that current reaches 63% in one time constant
Forgetting that inductor opposes current change

fr.name: Circuit RL
fr.description: Calculez la constante de temps d'un circuit RL.
fr.seo_description: Calculez la constante de temps d'un circuit RL. Calculateur gratuit, précis et instantané. Calculatrice facile a utiliser avec decomposition de la formule.
fr.example_label: Calculate the time constant and final current for an RL circuit with L=0.5 H and R=25 Ω.
fr.result_context: The time constant {tau} s determines how fast current reaches final value {current_final} A.
fr.formula_display: Ïâ€ž = L Á· R,  I_final = V Á· R (assuming V = 10V)
steps: Inductance L = 0.5 H, Resistance R = 25 Ω
Time constant: Ïâ€ž = L Á· R = 0.5 Á· 25
Final current with 10V: I = 10 Á· 25 = 0.4 A
mistakes: Confusing RL with RC time constant formula
Not understanding that current reaches 63% in one time constant
Forgetting that inductor opposes current change
